name: OLOID
description: OLOID — AI-based physical and digital identity verification platform for frontline worker authentication using face and mobile.

seo.title: OLOID — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: OLOID: OLOID — AI-based physical and digital identity verification platform for frontline worker authentication using face and mobile.

when_to_use: Face-based physical access control for frontline workers
Passwordless mobile authentication for factory floor devices
Identity verification for shared-device workforce environments
Biometric time and attendance for compliance audit trails
Zero-trust access enforcement for shift-based operations

pros: Face and mobile-based auth for frontline workers
Works in shared-device and deskless environments
Integrates with badge, kiosk and time-clock hardware
Strong ROI story for manufacturing and retail
cons: Very vertical; weak fit for pure digital apps
Biometric compliance burden varies by region
Pricing and specs not fully public
review.verdict: Purpose-built for frontline identity; avoid if your users are primarily office or remote knowledge workers.
review.best_for: Manufacturing, healthcare and retail authenticating shift workers
review.not_for: SaaS apps needing standard consumer or workforce SSO

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
